trait.name: Bless
trait.effect:
You are a pillar of strength and stability on the battlefield, granting the following benefits.
• Once a round, before an ally in range 1-4 makes any effect roll or save, you can cause them to roll it with [+]. A roll can only benefit from this effect once at a time.
• You may use Rescue to bring up allies in range 1-4 instead of adjacent.
• The first time you use rescue in a combat, it's a quick ability.

basicAttack.name: Glia
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 1 piercing damage. Hit: +1 piercing damage.
On hit [X]: Gain 1d3 strength, then distribute it in any order to allies in range.

keywords.name: Aura X
keywords.description: A persistent effect that moves with a character, affecting all other characters in range X and line of sight.

keywords.name: Pierce
keywords.description: Damage cannot be reduced in any way.

keywords.name: Stance
keywords.description: A powerful ongoing effect. You can only maintain one stance at a time. You may exit any stance voluntarily at the start of your turn.

keywords.name: Unstoppable
keywords.description: Can't be forcibly moved. Immune to the effects of all negative statuses. Movement cannot be reduced or stopped for any reason.
